tasks.subject: Task 1: Schema + DB layer + config
tasks.description:
migration 018 (oidc_client forward_auth_enabled/host + partial unique index) + 2 sqlc queries (GetForwardAuthClientByHost, SetForwardAuthConfig) + sqlc generate + configx.ForwardAuth{SessionTTL default 1h}.

```json:metadata
{"files":["db/migrations/018_forward_auth.sql","db/queries/oidc.sql","pkg/db","pkg/configx/configx.go"],"verifyCommand":"go build -tags nodynamic ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["migration 018 cols + partial unique index","GetForwardAuthClientByHost","SetForwardAuthConfig","ForwardAuth.SessionTTL default 1h"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: forward-auth building blocks
tasks.description:
forward_auth.go blocks: KV faSession, single-use faState, PKCE S256, host-only faCookie, writeIdentityHeaders, ForwardAuthPathPrefix, randToken. Unit tests.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/oidc/forward_auth.go","pkg/protocol/oidc/forward_auth_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/ -run ForwardAuth -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["faSession round-trips","faState single-use","PKCE RFC7636 vector","faCookie host-only","identity headers; empty email omitted"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: HandleForwardAuthVerify
tasks.description:
verify: resolve client by X-Forwarded-Host (unknown→403); valid cookie+live RBAC+enabled→200+headers; else 302 to /oauth/authorize (client_id+exact redirect_uri+S256+state). Tests.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/oidc/forward_auth.go","pkg/protocol/oidc/forward_auth_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/ -run ForwardAuth -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["valid→200+Remote-*","no cookie→302 authorize w/ params","revoked→302","unknown host→403"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: HandleForwardAuthCallback
tasks.description:
callback: popFAState + consumeCode in-process → verify PKCE+client+redirect → mint faSession + host-only cookie + 302 to OriginalURL. Reject bad/used state, PKCE/client/redirect mismatch, used code. Tests.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/oidc/forward_auth.go","pkg/protocol/oidc/forward_auth_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/ -run ForwardAuth -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["success→fa-session+cookie+302 OriginalURL","bad/used state→/error no cookie","PKCE/client/redirect mismatch→reject","used code→reject"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Route registration
tasks.description:
register GET /api/prohibitorum/forward-auth/verify (AuthPublic) + root GET /.prohibitorum-forward-auth/callback in server.go. Confirm oidcop alias.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/server/server.go"],"verifyCommand":"go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go test ./pkg/server/ -run 'Route|Operations|Sudo' -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["verify route public","callback root route","build 0; route tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: forward-auth-app CLI
tasks.description:
cobra forward-auth-app create --client-id --host: BuildClientParams (public+PKCE, no consent, callback redirect_uri, openid email groups) → InsertOIDCClient → SetForwardAuthConfig(true,host) + guidance.

```json:metadata
{"files":["cmd/prohibitorum/main.go"],"verifyCommand":"go build -tags nodynamic ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["create makes public+PKCE client + callback redirect_uri + no consent","SetForwardAuthConfig(true,host)","prints guidance"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Traefik integration docs
tasks.description:
docs/forward-auth.md: register app+grant; ForwardAuth middleware→verify; per-domain router→Prohibitorum; authResponseHeaders Remote-*; EntryPoint trustedIPs+trustForwardHeader; HTTPS-only; sole-ingress/strip Remote-* note.

```json:metadata
{"files":["docs/forward-auth.md"],"verifyCommand":"test -f docs/forward-auth.md","acceptanceCriteria":["middleware+router+authResponseHeaders","trustedIPs+trustForwardHeader","HTTPS+sole-ingress security note","registration steps"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Gate + runtime verification
tasks.description:
backend gate (vet/build -tags nodynamic/go test ./...; migration 018 applies); runtime via SUBAGENT server (curl unknown host→403; registered no-cookie→302 authorize). No SPA/dist change. Optional smoke.

```json:metadata
{"files":["cmd/smoke/main.go"],"verifyCommand":"go vet ./... && go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go test ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["backend gate green; migration 018 applies","runtime unknown→403; registered no-cookie→302 authorize w/ params","no dist change"]}
```
